case_title: GEORGE A MELENDEZ VS. JAKE PAVLOSKY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELENDEZ, GEORGE A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAVLOSKY, JAKE $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,590.00, $3500 PLUS COSTS IN INSTALLMENTS OF $200 DUE 2/15/2019, $200 DUE 3/15/2019, $200 DUE 4/15/2019 AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT DUE 5/15/2019. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY MELENDEZ, GEORGE A AS TO DEFENDANT PAVLOSKY, JAKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-20-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF GEORGE MELENDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAKE PAVLOSKY IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE DECEMBER HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
(SC-223) DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELENDEZ, GEORGE A
(SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS GRANTED: THE PAYMENT ORDER ENTERED ON JANUARY 8, 2019 IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED APR-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAVLOSKY, JAKE
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-04-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF GEORGE MELENDEZ. DEFENDANT JAKE PAVLOSKY DID NOT APPEAR. AT THE JANUARY 4TH HEARING THE COURT WILL HEAR ARGUMENT ON THE CASE AND WILL TAKE EVIDENCE. ANY PARTY WISHING TO BE HEARD MUST APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF GEORGE A. MELENDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAKE PAVLOSKY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
